title: II. Management Sciences Symposium: Sustainability and Green Transition - About
content:
II. Management Sciences Symposium: Sustainability and Green Transition - About

Dear Academics

Sustainability and environmental protection are becoming more and more important worldwide. In this context, II. Management Sciences Symposium, which constitutes an important meeting point in the field of management sciences, aims to address and discuss the issues of sustainable development, green economy and environmental transformation from an interdisciplinary perspective with the theme of "Sustainability and Green Transformation".

Main Themes and Subtopics:

Corporate Sustainability Strategies

Formation of Strategy: Determining the sustainability vision of companies and positioning strategic goals.

Implementation and Monitoring: Methods for implementing sustainability strategies and monitoring performance.

Green Financing and Investment Decisions

Green Finance Instruments: Financing methods such as green bonds and sustainable loans.

Investment Processes: Shaping investment decisions according to environmental, social and governance (ESG) criteria.

Energy Management and Carbon Footprint Minimization

Energy Efficiency Applications: Techniques to reduce energy consumption and increase efficiency.

Carbon Emission Management: Strategies and practices to reduce carbon footprint.

2. Green Transformation Processes

Digitalization and Sustainability

The Role of Technology: Contributions of digital technologies to sustainability goals.

Data Management: The use of big data and analytics tools in measuring environmental performance.

Green Supply Chain and Logistics Management

Sustainable Supply Chain Design: Environmentally responsible material and supplier selection.

Optimization of Logistics Processes: Restructuring logistics processes to reduce carbon emissions.

Innovation and Sustainable Product Development

Product Life Cycle Management: Design and development of environmentally friendly products.

Sustainable Innovation: Green technologies and innovative solutions.

3. Environmental Sustainability and Policy Making

Environmental Legislation and Policy Implementation

Laws and Regulations: Analysis of national and international environmental legislation.

Policy Development: Design and implementation of sustainability policies.

Public and Private Sector Collaborations

Partnership Models: Structuring and managing public-private partnerships.

Strategic Partnerships: Strategic partnerships to achieve sustainable development goals.

Civil Society Organizations and Participatory Governance

The Role of NGOs: Environmental advocacy and public awareness raising.

Participatory Governance: Active participation of society in policy-making processes.

4. Collaboration and Multidisciplinary Approaches

Academia, Industry and Government Partnerships

Research and Development: Transfer of academic knowledge to industrial applications.

Policy and Practice: The impact of academic research on policymaking processes.

International Collaborations and Networking

Global Networks: Coordination of international partnerships and collaborations.

Cross-Sector Collaboration: Bringing together organizations from different sectors.

Social Responsibility and Community Engagement

Corporate Social Responsibility: Increasing the positive impact of companies on society.

Community Relations: How companies interact with local communities and how to manage this interaction.

Event Date and Place:

Our symposium is scheduled to take place on May 8-9, 2025, at Istanbul Esenyurt University, accommodating both in-person and virtual attendees. For further details and updates regarding participant information, please consult our website.

https://www.esenyurt.edu.tr/icerik/2650-ii-management-sciences-symposium-sustainability-and-green-transformation-about

Call for Participation:

We invite you to share your original work with us for presentation at this symposium. The deadline for abstract submission is April 25, 2025.

The abstracts that successfully pass through the peer-review process will be disclosed publicly. Following the symposium, a proceedings booklet, complete with an electronic International Standard Book Number (e-ISBN), will be published in alignment with the qualification criteria for associate professorship.

Submission to the symposium is free of charge.

Registration and Contact:

You can access from the link below for registration:

https://www.esenyurt.edu.tr/content/2651-ii-management-sciences-symposium-sustainability-and-green-transformation-upload-abstract

"II. Management Sciences Symposium: Sustainability and Green Transformation" aims to create a scientific platform that addresses and discusses critical issues such as sustainable development, green economy and environmental transformation from an interdisciplinary perspective. Today, the global climate crisis, rapid depletion of natural resources and environmental degradation have made it imperative for the private sector, public institutions and academia to find solutions in cooperation. In this context, the main purpose of the event is to encourage the production of scientific knowledge by bringing together current studies on "sustainable management practices" and "green transformation processes" in different fields of management sciences.

We look forward to your participation and contribution to this important event.

Best regards,

II. Symposium on Management Sciences: Sustainability and Green Transformation Committee

[email protected]

Submission of papers to the symposium is free of charge.

This content was updated on 09/04/2025.
